description: CompositionRed and black check shirt made of 100% cotton, has full cuff sleeves, full front button placket with a tipped collar, patch pocket on left chest and a curved hemFittingRegularWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm ironFormal clothes don't have to be boring! Make your weekdays fun by donning this formal check shirt from genesis. This shirt looks fresh and crisp, and the fabric will keep you fresh all day long, while the long sleeves are sure to keep the winter chill at bay. Pair it with well-fitting formal trousers and a pair of leather shoes to take the office by storm!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
